pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 57 (complaintTitle field in complaint creation API call), task description line 1, task.json metadata field
setup_task.sh lines 48-49 (firstName='Victor', lastName='Vance' in people creation API call), task description, case details mention 'subject Victor Vance'
setup_task.sh lines 38-41 (firstName='Nick', lastName='Wilde' as Special Response Officer), task description protocol ('HIGH RISK...Assign officer Nick Wilde'), verifier.py line 83 (has_nick check)
setup_task.sh lines 30-33 (firstName='Judy', lastName='Hopps' as Officer), task description protocol ('LOW RISK...Assign officer Judy Hopps'), verifier.py line 97 (has_judy check)

privileged_info_summary: This is a conditional investigator assignment task for the ArkCase case management system. A synthetic complaint case titled 'Disturbance at Central Plaza' is created with subject 'Victor Vance'. The task requires determining the subject's risk level from their profile notes and assigning the appropriate investigator: Nick Wilde for high-risk cases (violence/weapons history) or Judy Hopps for low-risk cases (clean record/cooperative). The risk level is randomly determined at runtime, and the verifier confirms the correct officer was assigned based on this risk determination. All data entities (officers, subject, case) are procedurally generated via ArkCase API calls during task setup.
